allowed_values_or_source: repo-relative POSIX path under workspace root
description: Canonical path to the artifact file this sidecar describes.
validation_rule: Must exist at validation time if replay_safe or canonical_safe is asserted; relative path only.
notes: Join with workspace root; reject absolute paths outside repo.

allowed_values_or_source: registry artifact_type column or controlled vocabulary from switching_semantic_materialized_artifact_registry
description: Taxonomic kind of artifact (table|report|figure|script_ref|status|other).
validation_rule: Must match registry row when linked by script+column class.

description: Phase 1.5D family identifier governing semantics and allowed use.
validation_rule: Must exist in taxonomy; WARN if unknown.

description: Human-readable alias for logs/UI; not rename execution.
validation_rule: Optional; validate against alias_map when present.

description: Governance namespace for writer/lint scoping.
validation_rule: Must align with writer contract for producer role.

description: Optional parent for inheritance checks.
Upstream artifact this output derived from.

allowed_values_or_source: git SHA or opaque run id
description: Commit or run identifier when artifact was produced.
Primary producer script if applicable.
Column-level split for mixed producers.
validation_rule: Required when registry marks mixed producer.

description: Semantic strength of claims allowed from this artifact.

allowed_values_or_source: comma-separated or JSON list from allowed-use codes
description: Machine-readable allowed uses for this row.
validation_rule: Must be subset of matrix for semantic_family_id.

description: Explicit forbidden uses (mirror matrix NO).
validation_rule: HARD_FAIL if contradicted for promotion paths.

description: True if artifact is quarantined for diagnostics only.
Safe to cite in manuscript figures/tables without extra caveats.
validation_rule: WARN if true while quarantine true.

description: Safe inputs for automated replay harness.
validation_rule: Phase 4 gate: canonical replay requires consistency.

description: May feed canonical or authoritative outputs.
validation_rule: HARD_FAIL on unsafe promotion if true when matrix forbids.

description: Lifecycle vs governance docs.
Pointer to replacement lineage when superseded.

allowed_values_or_source: opaque UUID or repo lineage key
description: Correlates multi-file lineage bundles.
Run that created this artifact.
Writer or runner that emitted sidecar.
Sidecar creation timestamp.
validation_rule: Parse as UTC; WARN on skew vs manifest.

description: Content or logical fingerprint of primary source.
Hashes of inputs for reproducibility.
Hash of the described output file.
validation_rule: Should match file on disk when enforced.

description: Contract validation result for this sidecar.
Lint pass/fail from switching_semantic_lint_rules.
validation_rule: HARD_FAIL only for unsafe promotion per SW_LINT_019 class.

description: Human caveats and audit notes.
